headline: TTEK Clinches Single-Award Contract From Encina Wastewater Authority
summary: Tetra Tech wins EWA contract to deliver digital automation and operational technology solutions for a California wastewater project.

headline: The Trillion-Dollar AI Shockwave Nobody Is Ready For
summary: One small company quietly built irreplaceable power infrastructure in Norway years before the AI boom hit. In May 2026, it signed a binding letter for a 15-year, $2.6 billion lease to host AI workloads at the site. The market still hasn't caught on.

raw.headline: The Trillion-Dollar AI Shockwave Nobody Is Ready For
